summary: Matrix recording crisply captures a powerful Help > Slip performance with sharp Jerry work.
review: The matrix mix balances the soundboard beautifully, delivering crisp top‑end clarity, sharp Jerry guitar/keyboard midi work and pronounced hi‑hats while retaining some hall resonance. The show shines with an explosive Help → Slip sequence that many fans favor over the following night, though Phil’s bass is noted as a bit out of sync.

ai_rating.rationale: Reviewers praise both the musical performance (especially Help→Slip) and the high‑quality matrix recording; only one detailed review limits confidence to medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crisp top end, sharp guitar/keyboard midi work, clear hi‑hats, with pleasant hall resonance; matrix balances soundboard well.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set is described as a full‑course musical meal, with strong energy and pacing that many fans prefer to the next night’s performance.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Sharp midi‑work and guitar tone praised.
band_member_comments.Phil: Bass noted as not fully dialed in.
